Headline: #86 Narragansett/Ridgeland Temporary Reroute near Nagle/Avondale
ShortDescription: #86 Narragansett/Ridgeland buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near Nagle/Avondale, due to street blockage.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#86 Narragansett/Ridgeland buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near Nagle/Avondale, due to street blockage.

Northbound buses will operate via Nagle, Bryn Mawr, Northwest Highway and Nagle, over regular route.

Southbound buses will operate via Milwaukee, Bryn Mawr, and Nagle, over regular route.

Allow extra travel time.
